data.body: CI FLAKE confirmed: 748/749 Verified-1 on rebased PS2 = test_enrich_queue_prune_never_drops_concurrent_locked_writes (py3.11 integration-tier enrich-queue prune concurrency race, lost=234 writes) — pre-existing flake, NOT my change (750 stacked on top of 748 passed Verified+1). Remedy=recheck. Holding stack rechecks until after bug-fix 751 lands (rebase re-runs CI anyway). Current votes: 751 bug-fix pending; stack 748/749 Verified-1(flake)/LLM+1, 750 Verified+1/LLM+1, 752 pending. Plan: land 751 first (recheck if it hits the flake), then rebase stack, recheck flakes to green, live eval, close.
